---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the Fajar Lang compiler or tools
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Create a file `test.fj` with:
```fajar
// your code here
```
2. Run: `fj run test.fj`
3. See error...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include error message).

## Environment
- Fajar Lang version: `fj --version`
- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14, Windows 11)
- Rust version: `rustc --version`

## Additional Context
Any other context (screenshots, related issues, etc.)
